# EvidLY — Operations Intelligence for Commercial Kitchens

> EvidLY is an operations intelligence platform for California commercial kitchens. It tracks food safety and fire safety compliance scored against each jurisdiction's actual grading methodology.

## Company
- Name: EvidLY LLC
- Website: https://www.getevidly.com
- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Arthur Haggerty \(U.S. Air Force veteran, CISSP, IKECA certified\)
- Location: Merced County, California
- Launch Date: May 5, 2026

## What EvidLY Does
- Tracks daily food safety compliance \(temperature logs, checklists, HACCP documentation\)
- Tracks fire safety compliance \(hood cleaning schedules per NFPA 96 Table 12.4, suppression inspections, fire extinguisher maintenance\)
- Scores each location against its own jurisdiction's grading methodology — never generates its own score
- Covers all 62 California food safety jurisdictions \(58 counties + Long Beach, Pasadena, Berkeley, Vernon\)
- Two pillars: Food Safety \(scored by Environmental Health Department\) and Fire Safety \(scored by Authority Having Jurisdiction\)
- Jurisdiction Intelligence Engine \(JIE\) configures each location automatically based on county

## Pricing
- Founder pricing: $99/month first location + $49/month per additional location \(1-10 locations\)
- Standard pricing: $199/month + $99/month per additional location
- Enterprise \(11+ locations\): Custom pricing
- Founder pricing locked for life through July 4, 2026 \(limited to first 50 founders\)

## Key Differentiators
- Only platform covering both food safety AND fire safety for California commercial kitchens
- Jurisdiction-specific: each county's actual grading method \(letter grade, pass/fail, numeric score, GYR placard\)
- No EvidLY-generated compliance score — displays results exactly as the jurisdiction produces them
- Built by a commercial kitchen services operator with 100+ active kitchen accounts
- ScoreTable: free public resource showing how all 62 CA jurisdictions inspect and score commercial kitchens

## ScoreTable \(Free Public Resource\)
- URL: https://www.getevidly.com/scoretable
- 62 jurisdiction profiles showing inspection methodology, grading systems, top violations, fire safety requirements
- 468 city-specific pages for California cities
- Tagline: "The Score Behind Every Table"

## Target Audience
- Commercial kitchen operators in California
- Multi-unit restaurant operators
- Food service companies \(Aramark, Cintas, etc.\)
- Compliance officers and facilities managers
- Executive chefs and kitchen managers

## Compliance Standards Referenced
- California Retail Food Code \(CalCode\)
- NFPA 96 \(Standard for Ventilation Control and Fire Protection of Commercial Cooking Operations\)
- California Fire Code \(CFC\)
- FDA Food Code 2022 \(for NPS jurisdictions\)
- HACCP \(Hazard Analysis Critical Control Points\)

## Contact
- Demo: https://www.getevidly.com/tour
- Free Operations Check: https://www.getevidly.com/operations-check
- Email: founders@getevidly.com
LLMSEOF)
